name: agent-runtime-hooks
tagline: Reference documentation for the internal agent-runtime lifecycle hook system: 16 hook types, key files, and payload shapes.
verdict: Accurate, detailed, internally consistent reference material with concrete code examples for nearly every hook type and a clear registration flow. It lacks any scope-exclusion guidance despite covering a broad surface, and carries no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion guidance despite covering a broad 16-hook-type surface.
No version field or changelog section.
